title: Jewel Christmas
description: It’s Xmas time and what better way to celebrate than with some explosive matching action! Match three gingerbread men, stockings, trees, candy canes, presents or baubles and watch them explode! With five festive game modes and more challenges along the way this game is a perfect gift for you this Xmas! Expect plenty of jewel busting, exploding match 3 heaven with this cracker of a game!
instructions: Match any 3 decorations in a line to pop them Line up 4 or more of the same decorations and create Xmas Explosion decorations Match them or try to combine them to create even bigger blasts The more decorations you pop the more points you score
